name: WalletHub
description_short: Free daily credit score updates, full credit reports, 24/7 credit monitoring, and premium tools including spending tracker, budgeting, credit lock, and enhanced identity protection. Owned by Evolution Finance, Inc., founded 2013, based in Washington, D.C.
description_long:
WalletHub is a personal finance platform that provides daily credit score updates, full credit reports, 24/7 credit monitoring alerts, and tools to help consumers make smarter financial decisions. The platform is owned and operated by Evolution Finance, Inc., a private company founded in 2013 by CEO Odysseas Papadimitriou and headquartered in Washington, D.C.

WalletHub offers both free and premium tiers. The free tier includes daily TransUnion VantageScore 3.0 updates, access to your full TransUnion credit report, real-time credit monitoring alerts for changes to your credit file, a credit score simulator, and financial product comparisons.

WalletHub Premium adds a spending tracker, transaction alerts, budgeting tools, automatic financial account sync, enhanced identity protection and monitoring, credit lock, dark web alerts, daily credit reports from all three bureaus, and priority customer support. WalletHub Premium+ includes everything in Premium plus additional identity protection features and monitoring.

Beyond credit monitoring, WalletHub operates one of the largest financial product comparison platforms in the US. The site features detailed reviews and comparisons of credit cards, personal loans, auto insurance, home insurance, banking products, and more. WalletHub's editorial team produces data-driven studies and reports that are frequently cited in major publications.

The platform also includes financial literacy resources, a Q&A community where users can ask financial questions answered by experts, and personalized recommendations for credit cards and financial products based on your credit profile.

Consumers should note that the free tier provides VantageScore 3.0 (not FICO), which may differ from the scores lenders actually use. The BBB lists Evolution Finance with a D- rating due to complaint volume, though WalletHub has a 4.7/5 rating on Trustpilot from user reviews, suggesting mixed experiences depending on the interaction type.

pricing.guarantee_details: Free tier available with no payment required. Premium tiers offer enhanced features.

pros: Free tier includes daily credit score, full credit report, and monitoring — no payment required
Daily VantageScore 3.0 updates from TransUnion (most services only update monthly)
24/7 credit monitoring alerts for changes to your credit file
Premium tiers add spending tracker, budgeting tools, credit lock, and dark web alerts
Enhanced identity protection and monitoring on Premium plans
Extensive financial product comparisons — credit cards, loans, insurance, banking
Data-driven editorial content frequently cited in major publications
4.7/5 rating on Trustpilot from verified users
cons: Free tier uses VantageScore 3.0 — not FICO, which most lenders actually use for decisions
Free tier only monitors TransUnion — not Equifax or Experian
BBB D- rating for parent company Evolution Finance due to complaint volume
Premium pricing not publicly listed — requires signup to see costs
Revenue model relies on advertising and product recommendations, which may influence placement
best_for: Anyone who wants free daily credit score updates without paying for a subscription
Consumers who want enhanced identity protection, credit lock, and dark web monitoring via Premium
People shopping for credit cards, personal loans, or insurance who want side-by-side comparisons
Budget-conscious consumers who want spending tracking and budgeting tools in one platform
Financial literacy seekers who want expert answers to credit questions
diagnosis: WalletHub offers a strong free credit monitoring tier with daily VantageScore 3.0 updates, full TransUnion credit report, and 24/7 monitoring. Premium tiers add spending tracking, budgeting tools, credit lock, dark web alerts, and enhanced identity protection. The free tier alone is competitive with Credit Karma and other free services, while Premium adds features that rival paid services like Experian CreditWorks. The VantageScore (not FICO) and TransUnion-only coverage on the free tier are limitations. BBB D- rating for parent company Evolution Finance is a concern, though Trustpilot reviews are positive (4.7/5).

products_services.name: Free Credit Score & Report
products_services.description: Daily VantageScore 3.0 updates from TransUnion, full credit report access, and real-time credit monitoring alerts — completely free.

products_services.name: WalletHub Premium
products_services.description: Enhanced features including spending tracker, transaction alerts, budgeting tools, automatic financial account sync, credit lock, dark web alerts, and enhanced identity protection.

products_services.name: WalletHub Premium+
products_services.description: Everything in Premium plus additional identity protection features and expanded monitoring coverage.

products_services.name: Credit Score Simulator
products_services.description: Interactive tool showing how financial decisions (opening accounts, paying down debt, etc.) might affect your credit score.

products_services.name: Financial Product Comparisons
products_services.description: Side-by-side comparisons of credit cards, personal loans, auto insurance, home insurance, banking products, and more with editorial reviews.

products_services.name: Ask a Question
products_services.description: Community Q&A platform where financial experts answer consumer questions about credit, loans, insurance, and personal finance.

typical_results_timeline: Credit score available immediately upon signup. Daily score updates. Real-time monitoring alerts for credit file changes. Premium features available immediately upon subscription.
